signal.title: Derive M27 retention-policy recommendation increment
signal.summary: M26 shipped category labels but VISION.md still calls for redaction and retention defaults. Derive a bounded next increment that uses pii_categories to produce reviewer-owned policy recommendations without mutating retention_days/log_level/mask_in_traces automatically or claiming compliance/runtime enforcement.

evidence.value: M26 completed at git:c1cd53a6dcf04532fe9f27e610bbfb688bb2ced4; VISION.md lines 167-168 still name sensitive-field detection and redaction/retention defaults as broader product scope.
